blocks.text: Community Tested Routers

The following routers have been reported to work reliably from a number of users:
(**Preferred** BE/Wifi 7) - TP-Link BE9300/BE550 ($179-$299 US)
(**Preferred** AXE/Wifi 6E) - TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400 (~$190 US)
(**Preferred** AXE/Wifi 6E) - Davolink 'Kevin' Minion 6E ($129 US)
(**Preferred** AXE/Wifi 6E) - ARRIS Surfboard W6U ($29 US)
(AX/Wifi 6) - GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000 ($90 US)
(AX/Wifi 6) - PRISMXR Puppis S1 ($80 US)
(Last Resort AC/Wifi 5) - GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200 ($50 US)
(Last Resort AC/Wifi 5) - TP-Link Archer C6 or A6 ($40 US)

Achievable rates are subject to your specific setup, headset, wireless environment and could vary considerably. With a good setup you can expect:
AXE/BE (up to ~600Mbps)
AX (up to ~400Mbps)
AC (up to ~200Mbps)
Community Tested Routers

The following routers have been reported to work reliably from a number of users:
(**Preferred** BE/Wifi 7) - TP-Link BE9300/BE550 ($179-$299 US)
(**Preferred** AXE/Wifi 6E) - TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400 (~$190 US)
(**Preferred** AXE/Wifi 6E) - Davolink 'Kevin' Minion 6E ($129 US)
(**Preferred** AXE/Wifi 6E) - ARRIS Surfboard W6U ($29 US)
(AX/Wifi 6) - GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000 ($90 US)
(AX/Wifi 6) - PRISMXR Puppis S1 ($80 US)
(Last Resort AC/Wifi 5) - GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200 ($50 US)
(Last Resort AC/Wifi 5) - TP-Link Archer C6 or A6 ($40 US)

Achievable rates are subject to your specific setup, headset, wireless environment and could vary considerably. With a good setup you can expect:
AXE/BE (up to ~600Mbps)
AX (up to ~400Mbps)
AC (up to ~200Mbps)
TP-Link BE9300/BE550

The TP-Link BE9300/BE550 is a Wi-Fi 7 (Works for Wi-Fi 6e) router that has been tested as a good dedicated router for wireless VR streaming. It has 4 2.5GbE LAN ports and 1 2.5GbE WAN port.
*Note: Headsets do not support Wi-Fi 7 but Wi-Fi 7 routers function as Wi-Fi 6e as well*
TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400
The TP-Link Archer AXE75/AXE5400 is a Wi-Fi 6e router that has been tested as a good dedicated router for wireless VR streaming.
Davolink Minion 6E
The 'Kevin' Router is a good dedicated 6E Router, offering one of the best prices on a 6E Router/AP that has been tested.
GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000

The GL.iNet Beryl GL-MT3000 is a good dedicated router for bridging and repeating an existing wireless network. Unlike the GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200, the Beryl supports DFS channels which can be useful when there are limited clear 5ghz channels. Currently you will need to update this to stable firmware 4.6.2 or later for proper performance.

blocks.name: Dedicated Bridging Setup
blocks.value: Follow the [Opal Travel Router Setup Guide](https://discord.com/channels/564087419918483486/692030889932095529/1081059165713207326) or use r/opal for further information.

blocks.text: PRISMXR Puppis S1

The Puppis is a small USB connected device that uses a mobile device to set up a connection to your existing network. It can't be used for multiple devices but is a very solid option for just a VR device connected to it.
GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200
The GL.iNet Opal GL-SFT1200 can be used as a dedicated router for bridging and repeating an existing wireless network.

blocks.name: Dedicated Bridging Setup
blocks.value: Follow the [Opal Travel Router Setup Guide](https://discord.com/channels/564087419918483486/692030889932095529/1081059165713207326) or use r/opal for further information.

pages.name: tplinkc6
pages.title: TP-Link Archer C6 or A6
pages.description: (Last Resort AC/Wifi 5) - TP-Link C6 or A6

blocks.text: TP-Link Archer C6 or A6
The TPLink C6/A6 can be used as a dedicated router specifically for wireless VR usage, it is a budget router that works competently with Virtual Desktop at lower bitrates.
ARRIS Surfboard 6E AP

The ARRIS Surfboard Wi-Fi 6E AP is an excellent dedicated access point that has been tested for wireless VR streaming. It has a single 2.5GbE LAN port to connect to your network. Note that it can’t act as a regular router with other devices; it will only work as an access point for a single computer for VR streaming. Please note this only provides a 6E broadcast
